name: Yoga with Emily
description:
Yoga every Monday during school time: 7pm - 8pm.

Monday Evening Yoga with Emily.

This is a yoga class where you will be welcomed as you are - with no expectations or judgements. We move to find space, ease and stability in the body and to still the mind by connecting our movement to our breath. We always finish with a nurturing guided relaxation.

Classes are £10 and work on a drop in basis (no need to book).

If you'd like to find out more, please contact Emily: emswilkin@hotmail.com
